prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年吉林大学在广东省物理类最低录取位次分别为约19403名、18724名、24423名、19791名、32651名。2021-2024年位次基本在18700-24400区间波动，但2025年出现大幅后移，从约19791名骤降至32651名，降幅达12860名，属于异常波动。2025年基准位次约32651名；吉林大学在广东省物理类招生计划2021年280人、2022年275人、2023年275人、2024年266人、2025年265人，呈逐年小幅递减趋势。2026年计划256人，较2025年减少9人（缩招约3.4%），缩招对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 吉林大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第26名，近年排名稳定在24-27名区间，属于国内顶尖综合性大学；2026年声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及校园安全事件（前卫校区浴池翻筐事件）和学术不端舆情，共13条负面事件，可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制作用。抖音热度排名第40位（较热），综合热度约112万，短视频平台关注度中等偏上；吉林大学拥有A+学科2个（考古学、马克思主义理论），A级学科5个（化学、数学、机械工程、法学、物理学、兽医学），A-学科7个（哲学、工商管理、政治学、材料科学与工程、生物学、电子科学与技术、计算机科学与技术），共15个A-及以上学科，学科实力雄厚。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续偏高；临床医学、口腔医学热度稳定。广东省2026年物理类考生约456000人，较2025年440208人增加约3.6%，竞争略有加剧。；吉林大学位于吉林省长春市，与广东省距离较远，属于跨省就读。该校在广东省招生人数占全国总招生比例约3%-4%，广东并非其生源大省，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次异常暴跌后的反弹预期、2026年小幅缩招（-3.4%）、广东省物理类考生增加（+3.6%）、声誉负面舆情等因素，预计2026年位次较2025年有所回升（位次数字减小），但受考生增加和声誉影响，回升幅度有限。预测最低录取位次约31686名，区间31186-32186名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Jilin University in Guangdong Province's Physics Category were approximately 19,403, 18,724, 24,423, 19,791, and 32,651 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, rankings fluctuated within the 18,700-24,400 range, but in 2025, there was a significant drop from about 19,791 to 32,651, a decrease of 12,860 places, indicating abnormal fluctuation. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 32,651. The enrollment plan for Jilin University in Guangdong Province's Physics Category was 280 in 2021, 275 in 2022, 275 in 2023, 266 in 2024, and 265 in 2025, showing a gradual decreasing trend year by year. The 2026 plan is 256, a reduction of 9 from 2025 (a decrease of about 3.4%), which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jilin University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. It ranks 26th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 24-27 range in recent years, making it a top-tier comprehensive university in China. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is significantly negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents (the Qianwei Campus bathhouse basket-turning incident) and academic misconduct public opinion, totaling 13 negative events, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. It ranks 40th in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.12 million, indicating medium-high attention on short video platforms. Jilin University has 2 A+ disciplines (Archaeology, Marxist Theory), 5 A-level disciplines (Chemistry, Mathematics, Mechanical Engineering, Law, Physics, Veterinary Medicine), and 7 A- disciplines (Philosophy, Business Administration, Political Science, Materials Science and Engineering, Biology, Electronic Science and Technology, Computer Science and Technology), totaling 15 A- and above disciplines, demonstrating strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have consistently high social popularity; Clinical Medicine and Stomatology have stable popularity. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province is about 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,208 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition. Jilin University is located in Changchun City, Jilin Province, which is far from Guangdong Province, making it an inter-provincial study destination. The proportion of its enrollment in Guangdong Province to the total national enrollment is about 3%-4%, so Guangdong is not its major source province, and regional preference factors have limited influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the expected rebound after the abnormal drop in 2025 rankings, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (-3.4%), the increase in Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province (+3.6%), and negative reputation public opinion, it is predicted that the 2026 ranking will rebound compared to 2025 (ranking number decreases), but the rebound will be limited due to the increase in candidates and reputation impact. The predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 31,686, with a range of 31,186-32,186.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 31,686 (range 31,186-32,186). Within this range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Clinical Medicine, Law, etc.) as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors as safe backups. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 31,000), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., beyond 32,000), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 backups.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Jilin University in Guangdong Province's History Category were approximately 2519, 2779, 3810, 3350, and 4044 respectively. Overall, there is a fluctuating backward trend. In 2021-2022, it stabilized at 2500-2800, but after 2023, it significantly shifted backward to the 3300-4000 range, with a baseline of about 4044 in 2025. The enrollment plan for Jilin University in Guangdong Province's History Category was 24 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 29 in 2023, 36 in 2024, and 37 in 2025, showing a year-on-year increase. In 2026, the plan is 41, an increase of 4 from 2025 (an expansion of about 10.8%), which is a relatively large expansion and may alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jilin University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 26th, with a stable ranking in the 24-27 range in recent years, making it a top-tier comprehensive university in China. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is significantly negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents and academic misconduct controversies, with a total of 13 negative incidents, which may inhibit some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranks 40th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.12 million. Jilin University has outstanding strengths in History-related disciplines: Law A, Archaeology A+, Marxist Theory A+, Political Science A-, Philosophy A-, Business Administration A-, which strongly attract liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is recommended as relatively hot, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, and Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the number of History Category candidates in Guangdong Province is about 326,200, a significant increase of about 11.6% from 292,200 in 2025, leading to intensified competition. Jilin University is located in Changchun, Jilin Province, which is far from Guangdong Province. The proportion of its enrollment in Guangdong Province to the total national enrollment is about 3%-4%, indicating that Guangdong is not its major source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend of rankings, the significant expansion in 2026 (+10.8%), the substantial increase in History Category candidates in Guangdong Province (+11.6%), and negative reputation, the effects of expansion and candidate increase offset each other. It is predicted that the 2026 ranking will slightly shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 4044. The predicted minimum admission ranking is about 4356, with a range of 3856-4856.
